description: Integrate the conversion logic directly into the parent graph. Scan data/starter_resumes/ for un-converted PDFs/DOCXs and trigger convert_starter_resumes_to_json() programmatically before the job loop starts.

userStories.title: Automated parsing of starter resumes during graph initialization
userStories.description: As a strategic job seeker, I want the system to automatically detect and convert new PDF/DOCX starter resumes into JSON when the pipeline starts, so that I don't have to run manual scripts every time I add a new base resume.
acceptanceCriteria: Given there are unconverted starter resumes in `data/starter_resumes/`, when the `load_config_and_resume` node runs, then it should call `convert_starter_resumes_to_json()` to process them.
Given the conversion completes, when loading `data/json_resumes`, then the newly generated JSONs should be immediately loaded into the `base_resumes` state.
Given a conversion fails, when the node is running, then it should gracefully log the error without crashing the graph, continuing to process other valid resumes.
Typecheck passes and `tests/test_parent_nodes.py` is updated to mock and verify this behavior.

tasks.description: Update `load_config_and_resume` to execute `convert_starter_resumes_to_json(starter_dir, json_dir)` before iterating through `data/json_resumes/`.
Wrap the conversion call in a try/except block to catch `BatchResumeConversionError` or standard exceptions, logging failures while allowing the pipeline to continue.
Update `tests/test_parent_nodes.py` to assert `convert_starter_resumes_to_json` is called correctly during node execution.
